title: Define Wave 27 manager property form parity contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the manager property create/edit contract, enriched field taxonomy, validation semantics, and editor/detail UI state transitions for create, edit, conflict, and unauthorized flows.
acceptance_criteria: Contract defines enriched property form payload and response model for create and edit flows
Validation semantics cover required, optional, numeric, and constrained enum fields with deterministic error mapping
UI state map defines create, edit, save success, validation error, conflict, unauthorized, and session-expired transitions
